name: Event Timeline App Visual Redesign - Timeline Chevron Original v33
note: This is a Figma reconstruction handoff file, not a native .fig source. This version restores the Timeline node chevron to its original in-card right position while preserving v32 primary text right-edge alignment. It preserves v31 current-card behavior, v30 recommendation behavior, copy, business rules, and semantic colors.

topicCard.dateAlignment: same row as latest-update summary box, measured after layout
topicCard.directionText: secondary, lighter color and lower weight
topicCard.latestNodeMessage: primary, stronger weight with soft highlight
topicCard.textAlignment: direction text and latest node message share the same left text start

textRightEdge.myFollowing: topic text column aligns to baseline
textRightEdge.timeline: node title and summary align to baseline

recommendationCard.typeChip: removed from card; category remains in top tab
recommendationCard.followedState: moved under the existing left icon
